summary: Complete testing of Gates Operations Center (مركز عمليات الأبواب) page at /daily-gates and Gate Map Management page at /gate-map. All features working: Map tab with 17 gate markers and pan/edit mode toggle, Gates tab with traffic-light status toggle buttons and search/filter, Employees tab with staff assignment display (15 gates without staff alert), Changes tab tracking 3 changes. Backend APIs verified: GET /api/gate-sessions returns 1 session with 17 gates, PUT /api/admin/gate-sessions/{id}/gates/{gate_id} updates gate status, POST /api/admin/gate-map/sync-gates works correctly.

issues: Minor console warning: <button> cannot be descendant of <button> at line 339 (edit button inside floor tab button) - not user-facing but should be fixed for HTML validity

daily_gates_page.page_title: PASS - Title shows 'مركز عمليات الأبواب' (renamed from 'السجل اليومي للأبواب')
daily_gates_page.session_card: PASS - Session card for Feb 27 present and clickable
daily_gates_page.monthly_calendar: PASS - Calendar showing March 2026 with Feb 27 session indicator

four_tabs.tab_gates: PASS - data-testid='tab-gates' present (الأبواب) with badge showing 17
four_tabs.tab_changes: PASS - data-testid='tab-changes' present (التغييرات) with badge showing 3

map_tab.stats_bar: PASS - Shows Total:17, Open:15, Closed:1, Crowded:1, No Staff:13

gates_tab.gate_cards: PASS - 17 gate cards found with data-testid='gate-card-{id}'
gates_tab.status_toggle: PASS - Traffic light status buttons work (clicked closed then open)

employees_tab.stats_display: PASS - Shows Total:0, Assigned:0, Unassigned:0, No Staff gates:15
employees_tab.gate_staff_list: PASS - Shows all 17 gates with staff count (0 each)
employees_tab.no_staff_alert: PASS - Red alert showing 15 open gates without staff

changes_tab.change_items: PASS - 3 change items tracked and displayed

backend_api.gate_sessions_get: PASS - GET /api/gate-sessions returns 1 session with 17 gates

action_items: Minor: Fix nested <button> inside <button> in GateMapPage.jsx line 339 (floor tab edit button) - causes HTML hydration warning
critical_code_review_comments: Page title correctly renamed to 'مركز عمليات الأبواب' (Gates Operations Center)
All 4 tabs implemented: الخريطة, الأبواب, الموظفين, التغييرات
Pan/Edit mode toggle working on both /daily-gates and /gate-map pages
Traffic-light status buttons in Gates tab provide quick status toggle
Employees tab shows distribution even with 0 employees (graceful empty state)
Changes tab correctly tracks status changes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Feb 27 session with 17 gates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 tested the renamed Gates Operations Center page. Routes: /daily-gates (renamed title to مركز عمليات الأبواب), /gate-map (management). Key data-testids: daily-gate-sessions-page, page-title, tab-map, tab-gates, tab-employees, tab-changes, gate-map-container, gate-map-svg, gate-marker-{id}, mode-pan, mode-edit, gates-tab, gate-search, gate-card-{id}, filter-all, filter-open, filter-closed, gate-{id}-status-{status}, employees-tab, gate-map-page, sync-gates-btn, gate-map-canvas. Session: Feb 27, 2026 with 17 gates (15 open, 1 closed, 1 crowded). No employees in gates department yet.
